title: Minecraft Emerald
description: Endless Nomadic Adventures Vanila++ Fantasy Dimensions Mobile Bases, Mounts and Dinossaurs!
body:
![Cover Art](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/934f863367b8d3208c6423fd6563c5227940f066.png)

Drawing inspiration from adventurous classics like Terraria, Cubeworld, and Zelda. This modpack is designed for those who crave a blend of nostalgia and new horizons, with incredible mods 1.19.2 has to offer, it brings enchanted realms and mythical creatures ready to be discovered. Minecraft Emerald enriches the Minecraft universe with alternate adventures and creatures, providing boundless exploration and fantasy.

Timeless adventures such as the classic Aether and Twilight Forest.
New enchanted realms filled with mythical creatures.
Forge bonds with magical creatures that can accompany you on your travels.
Transport creatures with humane-sized cage traps.

Minecraft Emerald offers a world where you can glide through the skies, swing with a grappling hook, or engineer your own flying machines. Craft mobile bases and explore a world brimming with new adventures. The fusion of vanilla-style gameplay and innovative features ensures that every journey is unique and filled with wonder. Embark on your mythical adventure in Minecraft's Emerald realms, where endless exploration and boundless fantasy await!

Main Mods:

Transport and Storage:

- Carts
- Backpacks
- Gliders
- Grappling Hook
- Cloud Storage
- Ships
- Create Trains
- Immersive Aircraft
- Valkyrien Skies
- Eureka+Create

Mount Mods:

- New Mounts
- Gamma Creatures
- Animalistic
- Mythic Mounts
- Draconic Mounts

Fauna Mods:

- Alex's Mobs
- Ecologics
- Naturalist
- Untamed Wilds
- Bygone Creatures
- Critters n' Cryptids
- Wild Lands
- Recrafted Creatures
- Envirnmental
- Enchanted Fauna
- Creatures and Beasts


Friends:


- Kobolds
- Orcs
- Goblins
- Neighborly Folk
- Gnumus
- Shroom, Cacti and Moss folk
- Critters and Companions

Foes:

- Galosphere
- Luminous
- Sons of Sins
- Ice and Fire
- Legendary Monsters 


Dimensions:

- Aether
- The Undergarden
- Twilight Forest
- The Midnight
- Blue Skies
- Ad Astra!


Landscape Enhancements:

- Terralith
- River Redux
- Biomes O's Plenty
- Oh The Biomes You'll Go
- Distant Horizons
- Mystic Landscapes
